---
metadata-files:
  - shell/step.yaml
  - filesystem/step.yaml
---

# Alpine

{{< include _assgiment-description.qmd >}}

## Задания

### {{< meta shell.title >}}

{{< include shell/_theory.qmd >}}

{{< include shell/_task.qmd >}}

{{< include shell/_solution.qmd >}}

### {{ meta filesystem.title }}
